zh.lifeSummary: Phillip De Downe是Thomas Le Downe的兒子，於大約1348年出生在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐。他於1372年與De Downe在英國英格蘭戴文易亞斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Phillip De Downe是Thomas Le Downe的儿子，于大约1348年出生在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐。他于1372年与De Downe在英国英格兰戴文易亞斯特 唐结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Downe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Phillip De Downe was born about 1348, in East Down, Devon, England as the son of Thomas Le Downe. He married De Downe in 1372, in East Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillip De Downeは約1348年にイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンでThomas Le Downeの息子として生まれた。1372年にイギリスイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンでDe Downeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillip De Downe(은)는 대략 1348년 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에서 Thomas Le Downe의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이스트 다운에서 De Downe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Phillip De Downe родился около 1348 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия. Его отца звали Thomas Le Downe. Он женился на женщине по имени De Downe в 1372 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.
